prompt_md:
Complete the sentences about layered configuration.

1. The configuration layer that holds the immutable defaults the software ships with, and that every environment starts from, is the ___ layer.
2. When two layers set the same value, the rule deciding which one wins is called ___.
3. Supplying a value as the program starts (for example via an environment variable), layered on top so it overrides the files, is called runtime ___.
